about_item: Human-grade dog bed: The orthopedic dog bed features a 6" thick base excluding the headrest. The foam design is contracted from a 3-layer, 4-inch base (30D) + 1" memory foam + 1" eggshell foam infused with cooling gel. Creating a comfortable raised dog bed.

Vet Approved: Our dog beds cradle the bone structure posture, helping to relieve pressure, ease arthritis pain, joint inflammation, and other ailments, especially beneficial for older dogs and larger breeds.
Key features: Cooling dog bed, foam remains stable in warm or cold climates. Waterproof dog bed comes with 2 covers, an inner and an outer, both washable and removable.
Size: Meticulously sized for all breeds, cat, puppy to giant jumbo dogs, small dog bed medium size dog bed large sized dog bed, & XL dog bed we have you all covered.
Note: Upon initial unboxing the foam may appear compressed. Rest assured that it will regain its original shape within 24-72 hours.

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed to be of good quality, with one mentioning it works well for an 85 lb doodle. The bed provides excellent support, with one customer noting it's perfect for older dogs with hip problems.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed to be of good quality, with one customer noting it works well for their 85 lb doodle and another mentioning it's particularly suitable for older dogs.

examples.snippet: Good bed if meets the needs of your situation. Beautifully constructed and packaged bed, but be aware it is VERY firm....
...Ive been looking for a well made, thick cushioned & easy to clean beds for a while....
...It’s beautifully made and great quality! All 5 of my dogs have been on it and one of the cats. It’s only been out for 25 minutes 😂...
Very nice. High quality. Came in a nice package. It opened very easily I let it sit 24 hours. She was ready to sleep on it lol....

insights.title: Support
insights.summary: Customers appreciate the bed's support, with one mentioning it works well for dogs with mobility issues and another noting it's perfect for older dogs with hip problems.

examples.snippet: Good bed if meets the needs of your situation. Beautifully constructed and packaged bed, but be aware it is VERY firm....
...It's thick and it's firm and it is perfect for my older dog with hip problems.
...This bed is the firestorm I have found to support her aging body.
Soft yet durable, great for older dogs with bad joints. My 15 yr old dog loves this bed.

authors_reviews.title: Great for old dogs.
authors_reviews.text: Soft yet durable, great for older dogs with bad joints. My 15 yr old dog loves this bed.
authors_reviews.author: Athena Cadena

authors_reviews.title: The best bed !
authors_reviews.text: “GREAT” !!!! I have to shoo my little great grandkids off of it So my Dior a yellow Lab (89 lb.) can sleep on it !!! And the two little dogs try to take it over also.
authors_reviews.author: Carol

authors_reviews.title: Super firm for great support
authors_reviews.text: Great bed for older dog. I have an 8 year old 80 lb dog who needed better support for hips. This bed is the firestorm I have found to support her aging body.
authors_reviews.author: Ashley Moyer

authors_reviews.title: Old Lady German Shepherd approved!
authors_reviews.text: My GSD is so happy on this bed! As soon as I unpacked it she chose this one over her other 2 beds. She is 11 years old so I’m always searching for the best items for her comfort. This bed is great! I really like that the hair vacuums off of it so easily too!
authors_reviews.author: Kei Andrus

authors_reviews.title: Well loved bed!
authors_reviews.text: Great bed for my 85 lb doodle, perfect size for him. He loves it so much, he has not destroyed it!
authors_reviews.author: See Jane Run

authors_reviews.title: Excellent Value!
authors_reviews.text: My favorite beds have always been big barkers. I have big dogs. I want beds that use high density foam and support my dogs joints, beds that keep those joints off the floor. The truth is that most beds you buy, be it from here or from the pet store, are trash and won’t do that. Most barely have 3 inches of foam with no support. These beds are the exception. The dogs in this pic weigh 50-90 lbs the beds barely even give. The support is top notch. So great, I’ve even used them to replace cushions on my couch. You won’t be disappointed.
authors_reviews.author: Jen

authors_reviews.title: Perfect!
authors_reviews.text: Where to start? These beds are perfection! I have 3 boys, all over 50lbs+ .. and they loovvve it. Ive been looking for a well made, thick cushioned & easy to clean beds for a while. From the packaging to them getting good rest.. I cannot complain.Just let them rise as instructed. I rushed it a little and couldn't wait, so the cover is a lottle loose and isnt 100% flush w the foam.. but itll fill later.Overall, Take a chance on these beds.. you wont be disappointed!!! 5 of 5 stars!!!!
authors_reviews.author: Kristan Brooks

authors_reviews.title: Good bed if used in right situation
authors_reviews.text: Good bed if meets the needs of your situation. Beautifully constructed and packaged bed, but be aware it is VERY firm. This works well for our dogs with mobility issues since they dont sink into the bed making it difficult to get up, or trip getting in or out, but this is not the right bed if a dog likes to burrow into his bed or prefers a cushy surface. I would also describe this as more "slightly fluid resistant" rather than the advertised "waterproof". We selected this bed in part due to one of our dogs having occasional urinary incontinence, unfortunately the cover might slow the urine penetration slightly, but certainly is not waterproof. (Cover does wash well. Still trying to figure out how to remove urine from inner pad. Covering the bed with a true waterproof blanket from now on.)It is well made, visually appealing, and the dogs love it, so still giving 4 stars.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer
